scenes.dialogue: You have eighty-six billion neurons. Each one does something embarrassingly simple.
scenes.direction: Close-up, direct to camera. Slight knowing smile. Pause 1.5s after 'simple' — let it land.

scenes.dialogue: But together, they create everything you have ever experienced.
scenes.visual: Cinematic macro: bioluminescent neural pathways firing in sequence, blue-violet organic network, shallow depth of field, slow camera push-in, volumetric light

scenes.dialogue: And here is the wild part. We figured out how to copy this trick. Not perfectly. Not biologically. But mathematically. And it changed everything.
scenes.direction: Medium shot, leaning forward slightly. Building energy. Eyes bright.

scenes.dialogue: An artificial neuron takes in numbers. Multiplies each by a weight — a score that says how important this input is. Adds them all up. And then a tiny function decides: fire, or stay quiet.
scenes.overlay: Animated diagram building left-to-right: inputs flowing in → multiply by weights → summation → activation function → output. Clean, minimal, elegant.
scenes.direction: Medium shot, gesturing as if tracing the flow with hands. Teaching mode.

scenes.dialogue: That is it. That is the entire secret.
scenes.visual: Slow motion: single luminous node pulsing with light against vast dark space. Minimal. Powerful. Then camera pulls back to reveal thousands more.

scenes.dialogue: One neuron draws a single line through data. Useless on its own. But stack thousands in layers and watch what happens.
scenes.visual: Cinematic sequence: single straight line → camera pulls back → lines multiply into grid → grid folds into 3D structure → structure resolves into recognizable face/object. Abstract to concrete.

scenes.dialogue: The first layer learns edges. The second combines edges into shapes. The third recognizes faces. Complexity emerges from simplicity. That is the magic of neural networks.
scenes.direction: Close-up, building intensity. Slight pause before 'That is the magic.' Voice drops half a register — this is the truth moment.

scenes.dialogue: When you talk to an AI, you are sending signals through billions of these simple neurons, arranged in layers so deep they would fill a skyscraper.
scenes.visual: Extreme wide shot: vast vertical structure of interconnected light networks, scale of a skyscraper, camera tilting up endlessly, cosmic and architectural, lens flare at apex

scenes.dialogue: Each one does its tiny job. And somehow — understanding emerges. That is what a neuron teaches us. Simplicity, stacked deep enough, becomes intelligence.
scenes.direction: Slow push-in to close-up. Final line delivered softly, almost intimate. 2s silence after.

scenes.visual: Atmospheric: neural network structure dissolving into starfield, warm glow, peaceful resolution
